title: Building the App Store for Agentic Engineering
summary: Cole Medin is building a workflow marketplace for Archon, a platform that lets users define YAML workflows for agentic engineering that run in isolated git worktrees. The marketplace enables one-click installation of pre-built, battle-tested workflows to reduce duplicate work across users.
